title: chamaedrys palustris
intro: Chamaedrys palustris, also known as Wood Betony, is a perennial herb native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa, characterized by its square stem and yellow flowers. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Chamaedrys palustris has been valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Chamaedrys palustris include its potential to alleviate stress, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its ability to support digestive health and ease symptoms of menopause. Chamaedrys palustris is often prepared in teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies.
